The Concomitant/Prior Medications (CM) domain seemed particularly inappropriate when the substance was one that would never be given as a medication. checks.verbatim_byte_exact: PASS — source L6 '   c. The AG domain has advantages over the Procedures (PR) domain for this purpose.
